---
title: "William Song"
subtitle: "Data scientist and analyst"
image: assets/profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/canadasung
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/williamwnsong
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:canadasung@gmail.com
---

## About me

I am a data scientist and analyst with an MDS degree from UBC. My work sits at the intersection of statistical modeling, data engineering, and visualization.

I am most comfortable in Python and SQL for production pipelines, and R for statistical analysis and reporting. I am actively looking for roles where I can apply these skills to real data problems.

## Skills

**Languages:** Python, R, SQL

**Libraries:** pandas, scikit-learn, tidyverse, ggplot2, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy

**Tools:** Git, Docker, Quarto, Jupyter, DuckDB, PostgreSQL

**Methods:** Regression, classification, clustering, time series, A/B testing, data visualization

## Education

**Master of Data Science** -- University of British Columbia, 2026


**Bachelor of Business** -- Simon Fraser University, 2018
Joint major in Business and Computer Science
